texto: As soon as we got back I ran upstairs and told everyone the story, thus telling everyone the alarm code, thus breaking one of the Ten Commandments when I lied and said I’d keep the code a secret. As I’ve known for a long, long time now, hell is going to be totally fucking worth it.
explicacao: Citação de Sarah Royal sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “As soon as we got back I ran upstairs and told everyone the story, thus telling everyone the alar…” articula fe, humor, lying em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como lying e profanity.
